input.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

raw.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

winner: I told my friend I moved to Spain after Brexit because I love paella and sangria. He said, "That's great! But why did you look *forward*?

candidates.text: Why did I move to Spain after Brexit? I heard they have great weather and no Brexit—just *Brex-its*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Playful wordplay on 'Brex-its' is clever and specific to the Brexit context, with a surprise twist that fits the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: Why did the Brit leave for Europe after Brexit? To finally "break free" from their passport!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant to the headline and uses a play on words with 'break free' and 'Brexit,' but it's a bit generic and lacks the specificity or surprise needed for maximum humor."}

candidates.text: I decided to leave after Brexit because my flatmate's snoring got louder than Britain's trade negotiations.
